post_1.title: The Evolution of Web Design
paragraphs: Web design has changed massively in the past decade. Sites moved from rigid layouts to flexible, responsive interfaces that adapt to every screen size.
Modern developers rely on component-based structures, reusable UI blocks, and dynamic rendering to keep websites clean, scalable, and fast.

post_2.title: How Music Boosts Productivity
paragraphs: Listening to music while working can stimulate creativity and help reduce stress. Many students use ambient or low-fi beats to stay focused for long sessions.
Choosing the right playlist matters. Music without lyrics is often best for tasks that require concentration, while upbeat tracks can help with repetitive work.
